wine_experiences.name: Globos Arcoiris Hot Air Balloon over Rioja
wine_experiences.duration: Around 4 hours total with a 75-minute flight
wine_experiences.price_range: From around EUR 170-205 per person; EUR 165 for children to 12
wine_experiences.description: Sunrise balloon flight over Haro and the Ebro vineyards with a Rioja cava toast aloft, a Riojan breakfast on landing and a flight certificate.

wine_experiences.name: Bohedal Wine Blending Workshop
wine_experiences.address: Cuzcurrita de Rio Tiron, 26214 La Rioja, Spain
wine_experiences.neighborhood: Cuzcurrita de Rio Tiron, Rioja Alta
wine_experiences.description: Hands-on blending session at Bohedal contrasting Tempranillo aged in French, American and Central European oak, ending with your own blend.

wine_experiences.name: Eguren Ugarte Harvest Experience
wine_experiences.duration: Half-day; seasonal in September and October
wine_experiences.price_range: On request; combinable with a hotel stay
wine_experiences.description: Seasonal harvest experience at Eguren Ugarte: pick grapes in the Rioja Alavesa vineyards, then tour the 2 km of cellar tunnels and taste the new vintage.

wine_experiences.name: Vivanco Wine Tasting Course
wine_experiences.address: Carretera Nacional 232, 26330 Briones, La Rioja, Spain
wine_experiences.price_range: Course pricing on the reservations page
wine_experiences.description: Guided tasting course at Vivanco in Briones, learning to read Rioja styles and varieties across a structured flight in the museum and winery.

verified.address_quoted: Carretera Nacional 232, 26330. Briones - La Rioja. Spain

wine_experiences.name: CVNE Imperial Premium Tour and Tasting
wine_experiences.address: Barrio de la Estacion s/n, 26200 Haro, La Rioja, Spain
wine_experiences.description: Premium Imperial tour at CVNE in Haro: the Eiffel barrel hall and Imperial cellar, then Gran Reserva tasting with ham, Cameros cheese and chocolates.

verified.address_quoted: Barrio de la Estacion, s/n, Haro, La Rioja

wine_experiences.name: Marques de Murrieta Paired Premium Experience
wine_experiences.address: N-232a Km 402, 26006 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_experiences.description: Premium estate experience at the Castillo de Ygay: vineyard viewpoint, winery and museum, then a private paired menu with premium Murrieta wines.
